title: agrimonia pilosa var. viscidula
intro: Agrimonia pilosa var. viscidula, also known as sticky agrimonia, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of agrimonia pilosa var. viscidula include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for women's health and digestive issues. Agrimonia pilosa var. viscidula is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
